name: Venomous Attacks
entries: Once per turn, a creature you hit with a Wild Shape form's attack takes an extra {@damage 2d6} Poison damage, and you can force a creature you hit with a Wild Shape form's attack to make a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, the creature is {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} for 1 minute. It can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition on a success.

entries.name: Repeatable
entries: You can gain this Mutation more than once, but no more than three times. For each additional 2 Mutation points, the attack does an additional {@damage 2d6} Poison damage.
